description_long: This object is a rectangular cardboard box featuring a vivid image of a gourmet hamburger on the front. The hamburger depicted consists of a thick beef patty topped with crispy bacon, melted cheddar cheese, and thinly sliced onions, all nestled in a fresh lettuce leaf and a golden, sesame seed bun. The packaging is branded as 'Sims Gourmet Black Angus Beef Patties Bacon & Aged Cheddar' and includes detailed product information and branding on all visible sides. The box is primarily colored in shades of brown, black, and gold, with high-resolution food photography that highlights the burger's juicy and appetizing appearance. The sides of the box display additional product images and text, reinforcing the premium quality of the contents. The overall presentation is designed to attract attention and convey a sense of indulgence and quality.
description: A rectangular cardboard box with vivid branding and a photo of a gourmet hamburger with bacon, cheddar, and onions on a sesame seed bun. The packaging is detailed and visually appealing, emphasizing premium quality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main product branding and a large, detailed image of the hamburger with all toppings visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the box's narrow edge with partial branding and a cropped image of the hamburger.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, again showing the main branding and hamburger image.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the box's narrow edge and partial branding visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Crispy bacon strips and melted cheddar cheese are layered on top of the beef patty, with thinly sliced onions and a fresh lettuce leaf beneath the top bun. The toppings are evenly distributed and visually prominent.
